evidence_quotes.quote: Making a video game inaccessible after years of activity,

paragraphs.text: The difference between a library and a library? From the first, the books borrow them without paying them. From the second, the books buy them. Own them. You enjoy them as you feel and likes. You can draw us above, you can write other words on your book, comic book, magazine... This is your choice, as you bought it. It was on sale. So why is the same thing not applicable to video games? Many young people, adults, and even many older people, fun by playing. Why then destroy these realities? When you buy a game, you own it, point. It is a copy of the game. Making a video game inaccessible after years of activity, it is as if a day, carabinieri entered the home of each citizen to collect a single book to which he was sold. Why? Let people know what they are, leave people with their lives, let people enjoy their lives. Peace and love.
